title: feat: allowlist JustScriptzz + riofndev + solarnode-developement for community models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds JustScriptzz (195966113), riofndev (113566110), solarnode-developement (188266626) to COMMUNITY_MODEL_ALLOWED_GITHUB_IDS
- Next batch from the Community models whitelist Discord thread (the three marked waiting on 2026-07-03)
- solarnode-developement spelling verified via GitHub API (display name xyzprojectz = archary.dev; the -development spelling 404s)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Three new bees in the hive
gist.blurb: We just handed the keys to the community models garden to JustScriptzz, riofndev, and solarnode-developement. Can't wait to see what you build!
gist.summary: Added GitHub users JustScriptzz, riofndev, and solarnode-developement to the community models allowlist.
gist.impact: These three developers can now access and deploy community models on the pollinations.ai platform.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming three new friends (representing the developers) into a digital garden. She holds a VIP list or clipboard. The scene should feel welcoming and celebratory.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny security guard hat, holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) VIP clipboard and welcoming three cute little pixelated developer avatars into a lush digital garden. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
